objective: Grow $1000 with best live Sharpe, then return. Options allowed when 1 contract fits.

primary_equity.why: Highest Sharpe on $1k bag (1.95) with +102% return; reward weight 0.42
primary_equity.role: core growth / best risk-adjusted equity path

satellite_equity.why: 2nd reward weight; higher raw return (+108%) slightly lower Sharpe (1.59)
satellite_equity.role: optional risk-on overlay when v15 agrees

options_leverage.why: Best options Sharpe on $1k bag among opts (v31 sh=1.45, DD -2.7%, +53%); v32 softer DNA for research continuity
options_leverage.role: 1-contract debit calls when premium fits risk budget

rules.prefer: debit call or tight bull call spread

features_selected.method: mean IC with next-day return × half-window stability; drop corr>0.92

top.story: vol level; higher ATR often coexists with short-horizon mean-reversion / chop
distance to prior high — structure room (node DNA)

meta_mlp.architecture: MLP(32,16) sklearn, walk-forward 4 folds, StandardScaler fit train-only
meta_mlp.verdict: MLP alone does NOT beat buy-hold on this bag — use as soft size hint only, never hard gate

live_use.forbid: skip trade solely because MLP says no

feedback_loop.reward: increase weight of models with positive Sharpe on $1k bag

honest_limits: Options PnL uses model premium estimate + BS engine — not fill-realistic options tape
n trades on options sleeve is small (12–16) — Sharpe unstable
Equity +102% on high-beta names is path-dependent; paper first
MLP OOS filter did not clear buy-hold — features inform size, not prediction theater
